_comment_verification: 1. Recompute artifact_hash from content (sorted JSON keys, SHA-256)
2. Verify server_signature over artifact_hash using server's public key
4. Check idempotency_key was not previously submitted
5. Validate mandate_id is active and agent_id matches
_comment_flow: 1. Agent calls POST /api/v1/payments/authorize with mandate + amount + nonce
2. Server validates mandate, runs all security checks
3. Server creates artifact, signs it, submits to gateway
5. Server returns signed artifact to agent as proof of authorization
6. Gateway later calls POST /api/v1/payments/callback with settlement result
